description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the javiersantos/android-ci:latest Docker image, with two stages (build and deploy) and a global before_script that exports ANDROID_SDK_HOME and GRADLE_USER_HOME to the current directory and makes ./gradlew executable. In the build stage add a build:debug job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon --stacktrace, archives the presentation/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Also in the build stage add a build:release job that runs only on the master branch, first decrypts keystore.jks.enc with openssl aes-256-cbc using $key and $iv, then runs ./gradlew assemble --no-daemon, then executes echo "export APP_VERSION=$(./gradlew -q pV)" > variables, and stores both the variables file and presentation/build/outputs/ as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a deploy:artifacts job that runs only on master, disables the global before_script and cache, sources the variables file, copies the release and debug APKs to files named ORIOKS-$APP_VERSION-build-$CI_PIPELINE_IID.apk and ORIOKS-$APP_VERSION-debug-build-$CI_PIPELINE_IID.apk, and publishes any ORIOKS*.apk files as artifacts. Configure a cache keyed by the commit ref name that caches .gradle/caches/, .gradle/wrapper/, and .android/build-cache for the build jobs.
